close_reason: All Tier 1 child epics are closed with landed code on feat/more-om.
description:
Umbrella epic for the Tier 1 work from `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` practical backlog summary.

Use this epic when targeting only the highest-value foundational work for `@solvedbydev/pi-om-extension`:
- staged/public observation split
- earlier threshold/chunking policy
- temporal anchors and normalization
- lifecycle/completion markers
- specificity-preserving prompt/output upgrades
- stable/cache-friendly injected layout

This subtree is intentionally serialized for delegation safety because the work shares a small set of highly coupled files (`src/engine.ts`, `src/types.ts`, `src/state.ts`, `src/prompts.ts`, `src/format.ts`). If something is `ready` under this epic, it should be safe to delegate without creating avoidable multi-worker rebase churn.
title: Tier 1 foundation stream for practical Mastra-parity OM improvements
